market_pulse: Palm Tree Beach Club (Kygo residency) and Zouk momentum driving competitive dayclub engagement; Hakkasan's R&Bae Wednesdays building consistency; LIV/XS/OMNIA maintaining strong talent roster with Tiësto multi-venue presence.

weekend_readiness.label: HIGH
factors: Strong DJ roster across all major venues
Multiple confirmed events: Tiësto at OMNIA/Palm Tree (3/28, 6/28), Hakkasan R&Bae momentum
Palm Tree Beach Club (new May opening) and Kygo residency drawing high social velocity
Zouk April lineup includes NOIZU, Lil Wayne, SNW Night Swim (April 11-24)
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Confirm weekend talent announcements by Friday EOD; leverage Tiësto cross-property narrative if LIV has confirmed slots; monitor Palm Tree buzz for content gaps LIV can fill with exclusive BTS or talent meet-ups.

content_gaps.description: Palm Tree Beach Club & Kygo residency dominating dayclub narrative (new May opening, 232K IG followers already); XS/Encore have strong followings but less beach/dayclub exclusivity messaging
content_gaps.suggested_action: LIV Beach should counter-position with exclusive daytime talent or themed pool events (tech-house Fridays, guest DJ events).

content_gaps.description: Competitors heavily using countdown/teaser stories for weekend events; LIV has event calendar but less aggressive story-based hype cycles
content_gaps.suggested_action: Implement daily story countdown 48h pre-event with talent snippet, guest reactions, or BTS setup footage.

content_gaps.description: @globeth0tter and similar Vegas creators posting LIV content but organic, not seeded; OMNIA/XS have more active influencer partnerships visible in IG/TT feeds
content_gaps.suggested_action: Identify 5-10 micro-influencers (10K-100K followers) in Vegas travel/nightlife space; seed exclusive table/bottle service comps for weekend coverage.

content_gaps.description: Competitors benefiting from #omnialasvegas #xslasvegas momentum; #livlasvegas exists but lower engagement velocity vs competitors
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch #MeetUnderTheHalo hashtag campaign with weekly UGC repost & prize (free bottle service for best post).

influencer_activity.mention: Posted honest LIV Nightclub review as guest-list attendee; 591 likes, 61 comments; content focused on gal-on-guest-list experience.
Announced Palm Tree Beach Club residency (May 3rd start); 4,537 likes, 107 comments; dominating dayclub narrative.
